summary: Iteration 268 - Orbital Hub Satellite Navigation Testing Complete. All 15 satellites visible and clickable with correct navigation. User reported 'modules don't work' - RESOLVED. The hub was rebuilt with simple onClick handlers replacing the complex pointer event system.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 15 satellites visible, clickable, and navigate correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 268 verified the rebuilt Orbital Hub. All 15 satellites (mood, mixer, map, breathing, meditation, theory, workshop, star-chart, observatory, trade, oracle, games, journal, archives, suanpan) are now displayed in a single visible ring with simple onClick navigation. Central orb opens Mission Control panel. All destination pages load with content.
